chat.title: Quick question
chat.subtitle: Message us before booking
chat.aiWelcome: Hi! I can help with booking, availability and service guidance.
chat.aiPlaceholder: Ask about services, timing or booking...
chat.aiPricing: Service prices depend on selected service and possible add-ons. I can guide you to the best option in booking.
chat.aiAvailability: You can check current available slots in booking. If you need same-day confirmation, you can chat directly with the technician.
chat.aiDesign: For detailed design and nail condition questions, direct confirmation with the technician is best.
chat.aiBookingHelp: I can guide you step-by-step. Open booking and I will help you choose service and time.
chat.aiFallback: I may not have enough context for a precise answer right now.
chat.handoffSuggestion: If you prefer, you can chat directly with the nail technician.
chat.whatsappPrefillEt: Tere! Soovin küsida vaba aja või teenuse kohta.
chat.whatsappPrefillEn: Hi! I would like to ask about availability or a service.

hero.trustAnchor: Personal consultation, careful hygiene and a result that stays beautiful for weeks.
hero.luxurySupport: Meticulous detail, elevated hygiene, and a calm appointment experience in a private Mustamäe studio.

featuredService.priceTrust: Final price is confirmed before your appointment starts. 10 EUR deposit applies.

servicesUi.trustCue: Certified care, premium products and a hygienic work process.

localAuthority.title: Nailify Mustamae: easy to reach, easy to return
localAuthority.subtitle: Most of our clients come from Mustamae and central Tallinn for precise results and a smooth booking experience.

gallery.subtitle: Curated styles for everyday inspiration.

styleCaptions.glossy-pink-french: French gel design with a soft gloss finish
styleCaptions.matte-nude: Natural nude finish for everyday elegance
styleCaptions.chrome-silver: Statement chrome finish for special moments
styleCaptions.ombre-sunset: Soft color transition with a modern look
styleCaptions.ruby-red: Classic gel polish in a rich tone
styleCaptions.pearl-white: Clean light tone for a minimal style

gallery.featuredQuote: Soft gloss, clean shaping and long-wear finish.

gel-manicure.result: Even glossy gel polish with clean shaping.
gel-manicure.longevity: Usually lasts up to 3-4 weeks with proper aftercare.
gel-manicure.suitability: Great if you want a long-wear everyday manicure.

acrylic-extensions.result: Longer length, stronger structure and precise design.
acrylic-extensions.longevity: With maintenance, results stay beautiful for 3-4 weeks.
acrylic-extensions.suitability: Best when you want extra length or more structure.

luxury-spa-manicure.result: Polished hands, softened skin and refined detail.
luxury-spa-manicure.longevity: Most effective with a regular 3-4 week rhythm.
luxury-spa-manicure.suitability: Ideal if you want premium care with relaxation.

gel-pedicure.result: Clean pedicure with durable gel color.
gel-pedicure.longevity: Typically lasts 4-6 weeks depending on activity.
gel-pedicure.suitability: Ideal for durable and neat foot care.

team.subtitle: Certified Nail Technician / Mustamäe Studio
team.authorityLine: Specialization: natural luxury finishes and precision shaping.
team.story: Sandra loves nail art because it blends precision with personal expression. Her goal is simple: every client leaves feeling polished, confident and genuinely cared for.
team.signature: Signature style: clean almond shaping, soft blush tones and glossy long-wear finish.
team.point2: Medical-grade tool sterilization and strict hygiene protocol
team.point3: Premium professional product system for long-lasting wear

benefits.designsHint: Tailored to your hand shape and style.
benefits.resultsHint: Durability that keeps shine for weeks.
benefits.consultationHint: Clear plan before your service starts.

testimonials.title: Real clients. Real confidence.
testimonials.subtitle: Real nail results with honest words from women who trust Sandra regularly.

featured.name: Liisa
featured.quote: My nails still looked flawless after three weeks. Sandra's precision is unmatched.

c3.name: Anett
c3.quote: Best place for long-lasting and elegant manicure results.

aftercare.tip1: • Gel manicure usually lasts around 3-4 weeks.
aftercare.tip2: • Plan maintenance once outgrowth becomes visible.
aftercare.tip3: • Use cuticle oil daily to prevent dryness.

aftercare.subtitle: Daily care tips and curated products to keep gloss, shape and strength between appointments.
